name: Spinach-Stuffed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 10 oz pkg frozen chopped spinach, thaw/squeeze dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the thawed spinach (squeeze dry), Swiss cheese, ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and ground nutmeg.
2. Gently mix all ingredients until well combined.
3. Stuff 1/2 cup of the mixture under the skin of each chicken breast half.
4. Place the stuffed chicken breasts in a greased baking pan.
5. In another bowl, combine olive or vegetable oil with paprika, oregano, and thyme.
6. Brush the oil mixture over the chicken breasts.
7. Optionally, sprinkle additional paprika on top of the chicken.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, or until juices run clear.
